project_name: OpenPrint Dashboard E2E Testing with Playwright
summary: Implement comprehensive end-to-end testing infrastructure using Playwright for the OpenPrint dashboard frontend, covering authentication, job management, device registry, document handling, navigation, and settings with visual regression capabilities and CI/CD integration.

user_stories.i_want: automated E2E tests for user authentication flows
user_stories.so_that: login, logout, and password reset functionality is reliably verified across releases
acceptance_criteria: Tests validate successful login with valid credentials
Tests reject invalid credentials with appropriate error messages
Tests verify logout functionality and session termination
Tests validate password reset flow with email verification
Tests verify session persistence and timeout behavior
Tests support both local and remote environment execution

user_stories.i_want: automated E2E tests for print job management
user_stories.so_that: job creation, listing, cancellation, and retry workflows are thoroughly validated
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify job creation with document upload
Tests validate job listing with pagination and filtering
Tests confirm job cancellation functionality
Tests verify job retry for failed jobs
Tests validate job status updates and notifications
Tests cover edge cases like large file uploads and concurrent jobs

user_stories.i_want: automated E2E tests for device/printer management
user_stories.so_that: printer registration, status monitoring, and configuration features are verified
acceptance_criteria: Tests validate printer registration flow
Tests verify printer status display and updates
Tests confirm printer configuration changes
Tests validate printer discovery functionality
Tests verify agent registration and heartbeat monitoring
Tests cover printer deletion and unregistration

user_stories.i_want: automated E2E tests for document upload and retrieval
user_stories.so_that: document storage operations are validated end-to-end
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify document upload with various file formats
Tests validate document retrieval and preview
Tests confirm document deletion
Tests verify encryption-enabled document handling
Tests validate S3 and local storage backends
Tests cover large file handling and progress indicators

user_stories.i_want: automated E2E tests for dashboard navigation
user_stories.so_that: all user navigation paths are verified and accessible
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify all sidebar navigation links
Tests validate breadcrumb navigation
Tests confirm direct URL routing
Tests verify mobile-responsive navigation
Tests validate keyboard navigation accessibility
Tests confirm role-based menu visibility

user_stories.i_want: automated E2E tests for settings management
user_stories.so_that: user and system settings changes are properly validated
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify user profile updates
Tests validate notification preferences
Tests confirm email-to-print configuration
Tests verify admin-level system settings
Tests validate settings persistence
Tests confirm role-based settings access

user_stories.i_want: E2E tests configured for both local and remote environments
user_stories.so_that: tests can run against docker-compose locally and staging/production environments remotely
acceptance_criteria: Tests support environment variable configuration
Tests execute against local docker-compose stack
Tests execute against remote staging environments
Tests handle different base URLs dynamically
Tests support different authentication configurations per environment

user_stories.i_want: visual regression testing for critical pages
user_stories.so_that: UI changes are detected and unintended visual modifications are caught
acceptance_criteria: Tests capture screenshots of dashboard, jobs, printers, and settings pages
Tests compare against baseline images
Tests generate diff reports for visual changes
Tests support responsive design comparisons (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Tests handle dynamic content with appropriate masking

user_stories.i_want: E2E tests integrated into CI/CD pipeline
user_stories.so_that: tests run automatically on every PR and main branch build
acceptance_criteria: Tests execute on GitHub Actions/GitLab CI
Tests generate and upload video recordings on failure
Tests publish HTML test reports
Tests fail the build on critical test failures
Tests support parallel execution for faster results

functional_requirements.title: Playwright Test Framework Setup
functional_requirements.description: Configure Playwright with TypeScript, test utilities, page object models, and custom fixtures for the OpenPrint dashboard. Include browser configuration for Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.

functional_requirements.title: Authentication Test Suite
functional_requirements.description: Implement E2E tests covering login with valid/invalid credentials, logout, session management, password reset request, and OAuth/OIDC flows if configured.

functional_requirements.title: Job Management Test Suite
functional_requirements.description: Implement E2E tests for creating print jobs with file uploads, listing jobs with filters, cancelling jobs, retrying failed jobs, and viewing job details.

functional_requirements.title: Device/Printer Registry Test Suite
functional_requirements.description: Implement E2E tests for printer registration, viewing printer lists, monitoring printer status, configuring printer settings, and discovering available printers.

functional_requirements.title: Document Storage Test Suite
functional_requirements.description: Implement E2E tests for uploading documents (PDF, images, Office docs), retrieving documents, deleting documents, and handling both S3 and local storage backends.

functional_requirements.title: Dashboard Navigation Test Suite
functional_requirements.description: Implement E2E tests for sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, direct URL access, mobile menu toggle, and accessibility compliance.

functional_requirements.title: Settings Management Test Suite
functional_requirements.description: Implement E2E tests for user profile updates, notification preferences, email-to-print configuration, and admin system settings.

functional_requirements.title: Visual Regression Testing
functional_requirements.description: Implement screenshot capture and comparison for critical pages (dashboard, jobs, printers, settings) across multiple viewport sizes.

functional_requirements.title: Test Data Management
functional_requirements.description: Implement test data fixtures and utilities for creating test users, printers, jobs, and documents. Include cleanup procedures for test isolation.

functional_requirements.title: Multi-Environment Configuration
functional_requirements.description: Support configuration for local development (docker-compose), staging, and production environments with different base URLs and authentication methods.

functional_requirements.title: CI/CD Integration
functional_requirements.description: Configure GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow for running E2E tests, generating HTML reports, and uploading artifacts (videos, screenshots, traces) on failure.

functional_requirements.title: Real-time Updates Test Suite
functional_requirements.description: Implement E2E tests for WebSocket-based real-time notifications including job status updates, printer status changes, and new job alerts.

functional_requirements.title: Secure Print Release System
functional_requirements.description: Implement PIN-based card-based and mobile-app-based print release with embedded terminal support
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential for enterprise adoption addressing document security and privacy compliance

functional_requirements.title: Microsoft 365 Integration
functional_requirements.description: Deep integration with Microsoft 365 for direct document submission from Word Excel PowerPoint and Teams with SharePoint document library support
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Opens enterprise market with 350M+ Microsoft 365 business users

functional_requirements.title: Mobile Apps (iOS/Android)
functional_requirements.description: Native mobile applications for print job submission release and printer discovery with push notifications
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Critical for hybrid work and BYOD environments

functional_requirements.title: Cost Allocation & Quotas
functional_requirements.description: Per-user and per-department quotas with cost-per-page tracking and chargeback to cost centers or projects
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: ROI justification for businesses through cost recovery and visibility

functional_requirements.title: Print Policy Engine
functional_requirements.description: Configurable rules for color/duplex enforcement size limits application-based routing and approval workflows
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Operational cost reduction through automated policy enforcement

functional_requirements.title: FedRAMP & HIPAA Compliance
functional_requirements.description: Implement required security controls audit trails and encryption standards for government and healthcare sectors
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Access to regulated multi-billion dollar government and healthcare markets

non_functional_requirements.metric: Full test suite completes within 15 minutes with parallel execution
< 2% flaky test rate across 100 consecutive runs
Support at least 4 parallel worker threads for concurrent test execution
All sensitive test data stored in environment variables, never committed to repository
Each test uses isolated data to prevent cross-test contamination
Tests run on Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers
Screenshot comparison completes within 5 seconds per image
Tests run automatically on every PR with results reported within 20 minutes
Failed test artifacts (videos, traces) retained for 30 days

risks.risk: Test flakiness due to timing issues with WebSocket updates
risks.mitigation: Implement explicit waits and retry logic for async operations; use Playwright's auto-waiting features

risks.risk: Visual regression tests failing due to dynamic content (timestamps, counters)
risks.mitigation: Implement dynamic content masking and stabilization techniques; use consistent test data

risks.risk: Test data pollution between test runs
risks.mitigation: Implement proper test teardown and cleanup; use database transactions with rollback; unique identifiers per test

risks.risk: CI/CD pipeline timeout due to long test execution
risks.mitigation: Implement parallel test execution; split tests into critical and non-critical suites; use test sharding

risks.risk: Different browser behaviors causing inconsistent results
risks.mitigation: Implement browser-specific assertions where needed; use consistent browser for critical tests

risks.risk: Local environment differences causing CI-only failures
risks.mitigation: Use docker-compose for local testing matching CI environment; document environment setup precisely
Mock storage service for unit tests; use local storage backend for E2E tests when possible

implementation_phases.name: Framework Setup and Configuration
tasks: Initialize Playwright project in web/dashboard/e2e/
Configure TypeScript and test runner settings
Set up browser configuration (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)
Create test fixtures and page object model base classes
Configure environment variable support for multiple environments
Set up test data utilities and API helpers
Create base test authentication fixture

implementation_phases.name: Authentication Test Implementation
tasks: Implement login flow tests (valid and invalid credentials)
Implement logout and session termination tests
Implement password reset flow tests
Add session persistence and timeout tests
Create authentication page object models

implementation_phases.name: Job Management Test Implementation
tasks: Implement job creation tests with document upload
Implement job listing and filtering tests
Implement job cancellation tests
Implement job retry tests for failed jobs
Create job management page object models

implementation_phases.name: Device/Printer Management Test Implementation
tasks: Implement printer registration tests
Implement printer listing and status tests
Implement printer configuration tests
Implement printer discovery tests
Create device management page object models

implementation_phases.name: Document Storage Test Implementation
tasks: Implement document upload tests (multiple formats)
Implement document retrieval tests
Implement document deletion tests
Test S3 and local storage backend handling
Create document storage page object models

implementation_phases.name: Navigation and Settings Test Implementation
tasks: Implement dashboard navigation tests
Implement settings management tests
Implement user profile update tests
Add accessibility validation tests
Create navigation and settings page object models

implementation_phases.name: Visual Regression Testing
tasks: Configure Playwright screenshot capture
Implement baseline image setup
Create visual comparison tests for critical pages
Add responsive design comparisons (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Configure dynamic content masking

implementation_phases.name: Real-time Updates Test Implementation
tasks: Implement WebSocket connection tests
Test job status update notifications
Test printer status change notifications
Test real-time dashboard updates

implementation_phases.name: CI/CD Integration
tasks: Create GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow
Configure test execution on PR and main branch
Set up HTML test report generation
Configure video and artifact upload on failure
Add test result comments to PRs

implementation_phases.name: Documentation and Maintenance
tasks: Write E2E testing documentation
Create test data setup guide
Document troubleshooting procedures
Set up test result monitoring and alerts
Create onboarding guide for new test scenarios

key_gaps: Secure print release with authentication at device (PIN badge tap mobile release)
Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace deep integration for document submission
Native mobile applications for iOS and Android
User-based quotas and departmental cost allocation
Environmental impact reporting with CO2 tracking and paper savings
unique_selling_points: Modern microservices architecture with container-native deployment (Kubernetes-ready) vs legacy competitors
Open-source with potential for community-driven innovation vs proprietary vendor lock-in
Go-based high-performance services vs Java/.NET legacy stacks of competitors
Built-in OpenTelemetry observability from day one vs bolted-on monitoring
API-first design enabling easier integrations vs competitors' legacy APIs
Flexible storage backend (S3 or local) vs vendor-locked storage solutions
Modern React/TypeScript dashboard with superior UX compared to legacy Java-based admin consoles
